test.errorSummary: 10 test failures across 6 test files: (1) tests/e2e/onboarding.spec.ts - Playwright configuration issue (test.describe() in wrong context), (2) server/src/__tests__/paperclip-runtime-hook-support.test.js - missing file error, (3) cli/src/__tests__/issue-archive-stale-command.test.ts - 3 failures (command unknown error), (4) cli/src/__tests__/issue-liveness.test.ts - 2 failures (help output, reviewer packet), (5) server/src/__tests__/adapter-models.test.ts - 1 failure, (6) server/src/__tests__/gemini-flash-lite-router.test.ts - 3 failures (timeouts). All failures are pre-existing and unrelated to KB milestone - same baseline as normalization milestone.

reviewsSummary.note: Feature reviews NOT spawned due to blocking validator failure - kb-compile implementation is missing entirely

blockingIssues.description: CRITICAL: The kb-compile feature implementation is COMPLETELY MISSING. The compileCommand() function is referenced at kb.ts line 545 in the command registration but the function body NEVER EXISTS. This feature was marked 'completed' in features.json but no implementation was ever written.
evidence: kb.ts line 545: 'await compileCommand();' references undefined function
No function definition for compileCommand exists anywhere in the codebase
git status shows only staged changes to kb.ts (renaming placeholder)
wiki/ directory contains only .gitkeep - no wiki pages generated
Round 1 and Round 2 synthesis documented same issue - NO FIX COMMITTED
Running 'pnpm paperclipai kb:compile' would fail at runtime
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Implement the compileCommand function to: (1) Read all normalized .md files from normalized/, (2) Create wiki/index.md with conversation list, (3) Create individual topic pages in wiki/, (4) Include source references in frontmatter

blockingIssues.description: Milestone assertions VAL-COMPILE-001 through VAL-COMPILE-004 CANNOT BE VALIDATED without a working compileCommand implementation. The assertions require: creating index.md, creating topic pages, and including source references in wiki output. None of these can exist when the command function doesn't exist.

preExistingIssues.description: Pre-existing test failures documented in normalization milestone synthesis: issue-liveness.test.ts (2), issue-archive-stale-command.test.ts (3), onboarding.spec.ts (1 suite error), paperclip-runtime-hook-support.test.js (1 suite error), gemini-flash-lite-router.test.ts (3 timeouts). Unrelated to KB milestone. Same baseline as normalization which passed user testing.
Pre-existing typecheck errors: drizzle-orm type mismatches in board-claim.ts and workspace-runtime.ts. Same baseline as normalization milestone which passed scrutiny and user testing.

conclusion: Round 3 scrutiny validation confirms: The kb-compile feature implementation is MISSING ENTIRELY. This is a blocking issue that persists across all three rounds. The compileCommand() function is referenced but never implemented. The worker who claimed to complete this feature did not write any implementation code. Feature reviews were NOT spawned because validators cannot pass when the core function doesn't exist. Requires orchestrator attention to create a fix feature and re-run implementation.
